computed_variables.name: canopy_cover
computed_variables.description: Plot-level percent canopy cover from visual estimates, used as one of the main structure indicators.
computed_variables.english_intent: Plot-level percent canopy cover from visual estimates, used as one of the main structure indicators.

computed_variables.name: adult_tree_density
computed_variables.description: Number of adult tree records per 20 x 20 m plot after excluding cut and dead trees and retaining paper-eligible plots.
computed_variables.english_intent: Number of adult tree records per 20 x 20 m plot after excluding cut and dead trees and retaining paper-eligible plots.

computed_variables.name: tree_heightdiameter_ratio__loglog
computed_variables.description: Average log-log height-diameter ratio for trees included by the paper's HD filter.
computed_variables.english_intent: Average log-log height-diameter ratio for trees included by the paper's HD filter.

compiled.code: const logHd = mean(rows.filter(r => Number(r.HD_include) === 1).map(r => Math.log(Number(r.Height)) / Math.log(Number(r.DBH))));

evidence.snippet: mean(log(Height) / log(DBH)) for rows with HD_include == 1

computed_variables.name: adult_species_density
computed_variables.description: Count of distinct adult tree species in each plot.
computed_variables.english_intent: Count of distinct adult tree species in each plot.

evidence.snippet: number of unique adult species per Plot_code

computed_variables.name: adult_late_successional_species_density
computed_variables.description: Count of distinct mature-forest adult species per plot after joining species traits.
computed_variables.english_intent: Count of distinct mature-forest adult species per plot after joining species traits.

compiled.code: const lateSuccessionalAdultSpecies = new Set(rows.filter(r => r.Habt_New === 'Mature').map(r => r.species).filter(Boolean)).size;

evidence.snippet: number of unique adult species per plot where Habt_New == 'Mature'

computed_variables.name: community_similarity_to_benchmark_rainforest
computed_variables.description: Bray-Curtis similarity of each plot's adult-species composition to benchmark plots, scaled as 100 * (1 - average Bray-Curtis distance to benchmarks).
computed_variables.english_intent: Bray-Curtis similarity of each plot's adult-species composition to benchmark plots, scaled as 100 * (1 - average Bray-Curtis distance to benchmarks).

evidence.snippet: Bray-Curtis similarity of each plot's adult-species composition to benchmark plots, scaled as 100 * (1 - average Bray-Curtis distance to benchmarks).

computed_variables.name: sapling_density
computed_variables.description: Total counted seedlings and saplings per 5 x 5 m subplot.
computed_variables.english_intent: Total counted seedlings and saplings per 5 x 5 m subplot.

computed_variables.name: sapling_native_fraction
computed_variables.description: Fraction of sapling abundance contributed by non-introduced species.
computed_variables.english_intent: Fraction of sapling abundance contributed by non-introduced species.

compiled.code: const nativeFraction = sum(rows.filter(r => r.Habt_New !== 'Int').map(r => Number(r.regen))) / sum(rows.map(r => Number(r.regen)));

computed_variables.name: sapling_species_density
computed_variables.description: Count of sapling species entries per plot; in the Osuri table this is effectively sapling species richness.
computed_variables.english_intent: Count of sapling species entries per plot; in the Osuri table this is effectively sapling species richness.

compiled.code: const saplingSpeciesDensity = new Set(rows.map(r => r.acc_name || r['Species.name']).filter(Boolean)).size;

evidence.snippet: number of recorded sapling species rows per Plot_code

computed_variables.name: sapling_late_successional_species_density
computed_variables.description: Count of mature-forest sapling species per plot.
computed_variables.english_intent: Count of mature-forest sapling species per plot.

compiled.code: const saplingLateSuccessionalSpecies = new Set(rows.filter(r => r.Habt_New === 'Mature').map(r => r.acc_name).filter(Boolean)).size;

evidence.snippet: number of sapling species rows where Habt_New == 'Mature'

computed_variables.name: aboveground_carbon_storage
computed_variables.description: Per-tree carbon is estimated from wood density, DBH, and height using the Chave-style allometry implemented in the paper's R script, then summed and scaled to Mg/ha.
computed_variables.english_intent: Per-tree carbon is estimated from wood density, DBH, and height using the Chave-style allometry implemented in the paper's R script, then summed and scaled to Mg/ha.

evidence.snippet: Per-tree carbon is estimated from wood density, DBH, and height using the Chave-style allometry implemented in the paper's R script, then summed and scaled to Mg/ha.

computed_variables.name: distance_to_contiguous_forest
computed_variables.description: Isolation covariate used in the paper's Active-vs-Passive interaction models; not itself one of the 11 response indicators.
computed_variables.english_intent: Isolation covariate used in the paper's Active-vs-Passive interaction models; not itself one of the 11 response indicators.

computed_variables.name: meta_canopy_height
computed_variables.description: External satellite-derived structural analogue sampled at Osuri plot locations from the Meta canopy asset used in this project.
computed_variables.english_intent: External satellite-derived structural analogue sampled at Osuri plot locations from the Meta canopy asset used in this project.

evidence.snippet: External satellite-derived structural analogue sampled at Osuri plot locations from the Meta canopy asset used in this project.

computed_variables.name: alpha_earth_embedding_similarity_to_benchmark
computed_variables.description: External embedding-space analogue computed by comparing each plot's Alpha Earth vector to the benchmark centroid.
computed_variables.english_intent: External embedding-space analogue computed by comparing each plot's Alpha Earth vector to the benchmark centroid.

evidence.snippet: External embedding-space analogue computed by comparing each plot's Alpha Earth vector to the benchmark centroid.
